name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: At 4655 S Ashland in Chicago, IL, PLS Check Cashers offers 24-hour check cashing and payment services.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers operates at 4655 S Ashland Ave in Chicago, IL, a standalone check-cashing location on the South Side that's open 24 hours every day of the week. This convenient location serves Chicago residents and visitors who need check cashing, money transfers, or other financial services outside traditional banking hours.

At this Chicago branch on S Ashland, PLS Check Cashers provides rapid check cashing, money transfer services, bill payment options, and additional financial services. For specific details about services offered at this 4655 S Ashland location or to verify hours, contact the store at +1 773-523-2111.

If you need to cash a check in Chicago, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check to this S Ashland location. Available 24/7, this branch serves Chicago's diverse community and provides quick, reliable service for those seeking fast financial solutions.
pros: 24/7 operating hours at all locations for accessibility during non-standard hours
Multi-service locations consolidate check cashing, money orders, bill pay, and financial products in one visit
Ria Money Transfer integration enables international money transfers alongside domestic services
Government benefits processing reduces barriers for Social Security and disability benefit recipients
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard with mobile app provides unbanked consumers access to card-based payment systems
Notary, fax, copy, and administrative services available eliminates need for multiple service providers
Presence across 12 states demonstrates operational scale and geographic accessibility
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website—check-cashing and money transfer fees structure opaque to consumers
Debit card products (Xpectations! PLUS) may carry monthly fees or other charges not detailed on examined pages
Alternative financial services typically carry higher transaction costs than traditional banking, disadvantaging low-income users
Updated privacy policy indicates extensive data collection practices; specific uses beyond service delivery not transparent
No information provided on credit-building features or financial education resources for underbanked consumers
best_for: Unbanked workers who receive paychecks and need same-day access to funds without traditional bank accounts
Immigrants and international workers who need reliable domestic and international money transfer services
Government benefits recipients (Social Security, disability) requiring accessible check-cashing and bill payment services
Small business owners needing accessible business financial services and administrative support outside standard banking hours
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need convenient, accessible financial services outside traditional banking hours and geographic constraints. The primary caveat is lack of fee transparency—consumers should contact locations directly (773-342-0995 for Chicago) or call customer service (833-665-0018) to understand transaction costs before using services, as check-cashing and money transfer fees can significantly impact value for price-sensitive users.
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 4655 S Ashland, Chicago, IL. 24-hour check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services.
